narrative:
Brown County has 28,670 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.9% of registrants.
